name: DarthClaw VRF
description: Verifiable randomness (VRF) API for AI agents and onchain apps. Cryptographically provable randomness for gaming, NFT reveals, lotteries, and agent decision-making. x402 micropayments at $0.005/request. Supports single values, ranges (min/max), and batch (1–100). ERC-8004 registered on Base, Ethereum, and BNB Chain.
